reason_for_decision: The revised article now treats radar economics as a lifecycle and mission-effectiveness problem, which gives it clear decision value and enough depth to pass.
strengths: It replaces shallow price-versus-performance framing with a mission-consequence model.
The scoring and procurement red-flag sections make the article actionable for real trade studies.
The tone stays neutral and avoids product-led drift.
summary_assessment: This article now passes comfortably. It is more rigorous, more useful for buying decisions, and more editorially controlled than the earlier version.
